entities.title: Cloud Control
entities.summary: Central cloud ingestion, campaign control, and fleet reporting.

entities.title: Machine Edge
entities.summary: Device-local telemetry and OTA execution responsibilities.

entities.title: Platform Operations
entities.summary: Cloud runtime operations plus identity and secret-management controls.

entities.title: Cloud Runtime Operations
entities.summary: Owns runtime deployment lifecycle, scaling controls, and runtime operational safety.

entities.title: Device Identity and Secrets
entities.summary: Manages device credentials, cloud tokens, and secure configuration used by edge/cloud units.

entities.title: Fleet Ingestion API
entities.summary: Receives telemetry and machine status, applies validation, and emits ingestion events.

entities.title: Fleet Observability Reporting
entities.summary: Aggregates telemetry and OTA outcomes into dashboards, alerts, and audit records.

entities.title: Machine Telemetry Collection
entities.summary: Collects brew/device telemetry and transmits cloud-bound telemetry payloads.

entities.title: OTA Update Agent
entities.summary: Downloads signed firmware bundles, validates integrity, applies updates, and reports status.

entities.title: Update Campaign Orchestration
entities.summary: Plans OTA rollout cohorts, drives update commands, and handles rollback flow decisions.

entities.title: REQ-COF-001
entities.summary: While coffee machine fleet operation is active, when brew cycle completed event is received, the coffee fleet system shall publish brew telemetry to fleet ingestion api.

entities.title: REQ-COF-002
entities.summary: While coffee machine fleet operation is active, when telemetry ingested event is received, the coffee fleet system shall persist fleet telemetry metrics for fleet operator.

entities.title: REQ-COF-003
entities.summary: Where ota campaign is enabled, when ota campaign scheduled event is received, the coffee fleet system shall distribute signed firmware bundle to targeted machine cohort.

entities.title: REQ-COF-004
entities.summary: Where ota campaign is enabled, when ota campaign scheduled event is received, the coffee fleet system shall gate firmware apply on firmware signature is valid.

entities.title: REQ-COF-005
entities.summary: If firmware validation failed event is received, then the coffee fleet system shall rollback firmware apply.

entities.title: REQ-COF-006
entities.summary: If cloud ingest endpoint is unavailable, then the coffee fleet system shall queue telemetry for retry.

entities.title: REQ-COF-007
entities.summary: Where audit logging is enabled, when ota status reported event is received, the coffee fleet system shall persist redacted audit log record with machine identity plus campaign id.

entities.title: REQ-COF-008
entities.summary: If telemetry replay abuse is detected, then the coffee fleet system shall throttle duplicate telemetry.

entities.title: REQ-COF-009
entities.summary: While coffee machine fleet operation is active, when telemetry ingested event is received, the coffee fleet system shall persist logging records for fleet operator.

entities.title: REQ-COF-010
entities.summary: If firmware validation failed event is received, then the coffee fleet system shall report ota status to update campaign orchestration.

entities.title: REQ-COF-011
entities.summary: If cloud ingest endpoint is unavailable, then the coffee fleet system shall flush queued telemetry when normal mode is active.

entities.title: REQ-COF-012
entities.summary: If telemetry replay abuse is detected, then the coffee fleet system shall notify security analyst.
